creator: lightside@gmx.com
text:
(In reply to Kubilay Kocak from comment #6)
> If oolite supports Python 2.x/3.x, USES=python:<version-spec> should be 2.7+
> or 2.7-3.x where x is the highest currently supported Python 3.x version
Yes, games/oolite build system supports Python 2.x. The dynamic patches and usage of 2to3 program before build stage allows to build with using Python 3.x. So, the first patch in attachment #210354, which uses 2.7+ should be fine, while lang/python27 port is available (and not deprecated). I obsoleted attachment #210814.

Thanks for clarification.
